about-description: I'm a self-driven developer with a background in Computer Information Systems and a genuine interest in building things the right way: clean architecture, good tooling, and software that holds up over time. I got into programming at 14 and it's never felt like work; I'm always picking up new languages, exploring new tools, or diving into something I don't fully understand yet. I tend to own projects end to end, from initial design through deployment and maintenance, which has given me a well-rounded perspective on what it actually takes to ship and sustain real software. Outside of code, I've been seriously studying Japanese for a while now.
about-meta-description: A bit about me and what I do.
blog-meta-description: A collection of posts where I share things that interest me.
contact-disclaimer: i'll only respond to proposals that are a good match for my schedule and interests. thank you.
contact-meta-description: Have a question, proposal, or just want to say hi? Find my social links here.
home-meta-description: I work with software to bring ideas to life.
resume-meta-description: Resume of Sean McBroom — software developer from Des Moines, Iowa specializing in TypeScript, JavaScript, and full-stack web development with React, Vue, and Express.
